name: Rujak (Pungent Fruit Salad)
recipeIngredient: Papaya, firm, ripe, diced into 1/2-inch cubes
Pineapple, ripe, diced into 1/2-inch cubes, fresh or canned
Apple, tart, firm, diced into 1/2-inch cubes
Mango, almost ripe, peeled and cubed
Red chiles, fresh, hot, seeded and sliced (optional)
Tamarind paste dissolved in strained water
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the cucumber and cut it in half lengthwise. Scoop out and discard the seeds.
2. Cut the cucumber halves into 1/4-inch thick half moons.
3. Mix the cucumber with jicama and fruit.
4. Prepare a sauce by processing peanuts to a crunchy consistency first. Then add chiles, sugar, and tamarind liquid. Process until the sauce has texture but does not become too smooth.
5. Toss the sauce and fruit together.
6. Serve chilled or at room temperature as a snack, or with an assortment of Sumatran dishes.
Serves 6.
